title: Wednesday and Friday late arrivals are clustering
signal: 8 late logins were recorded across the last two tracked weeks, mostly between 9:45 AM and 10:10 AM.
attention_point: Standup attendance and client handoff coverage may be affected for this team.
recommended_action: Review commute flexibility and assign a backup owner for the first hour on Wednesdays and Fridays.

title: Attendance dipped while performance stayed stable
signal: Attendance is 96% with one late login, while performance remains at 87.
attention_point: No performance issue is detected but the attendance pattern should be checked before it repeats.
recommended_action: Manager should have a short check-in and confirm if leave planning or schedule support is needed.

title: Sprint planning changes improved productivity
signal: Productivity trend improved by 9 points after planning changes.
attention_point: The same planning rhythm may help teams with lower review completion.
recommended_action: Document the planning routine and pilot it with one more department next cycle.
